g.text: ZooKeeper Distributed Lock: Naive Herd vs Sequential-Nodes Baton
every client puts a watch on the same znode
N watchers on the same znode
ZooKeeper fires watch on ALL N clients
→ all N race to create the next /lock; only one wins; N-1 wasted RPCs
each client creates an ephemeral-sequential child; watches only the one below it
ZooKeeper fires watch on EXACTLY ONE client
→ lock-0002's watch fires; it owns the lock; the rest stay asleep.
